---
title: "Code Connect Summit 2026"
---

```{=html}
<!-- NAV -->
<nav class="ccs-nav" aria-label="Site navigation">
  <a class="ccs-nav-logo" href="#"><img src="images/Araxi_Group_Synthesis_White.png" alt="Synthesis" style="height:108px;"></a>
  <ul class="ccs-nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#hosts">Hosts</a></li>
    <li><a href="#speakers">Speakers</a></li>
    <li><a href="#schedule">Schedule</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a class="ccs-nav-rsvp" href="https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=hdvPlCM9SUigZlza2WXM2AYv7RPSF49BsSdfvCGj1WdUQTJHV1Q1SUtVSjlDMVBZQTdOMTdUVlNWMS4u">RSVP Now</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ccs-hero">
  <div class="ccs-hero-label">Conference · 2026</div>
  <h1 class="ccs-hero-title">Code Connect<br>Summit</h1>
  <div class="ccs-hero-pills">
    <span class="ccs-hero-pill">Presentations</span>
    <span class="ccs-hero-pill">Panel</span>
    <span class="ccs-hero-pill">Keynote</span>
    <span class="ccs-hero-pill">Workshop</span>
  </div>
  <p class="ccs-hero-tagline">An extraordinary showcase of innovation for the Synthesis tech team.</p>
  <div class="ccs-hero-meta">
    <span class="ccs-hero-meta-item"><span class="ccs-hero-meta-icon" aria-hidden="true">⏰</span> June 5, 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 09:00–16:30</span>
    <span class="ccs-hero-meta-item"><span class="ccs-hero-meta-icon" aria-hidden="true">📍</span> Synthesis Office &nbsp;·&nbsp; JHB &amp; CPT</span>
    <span class="ccs-hero-meta-item"><span class="ccs-hero-meta-icon" aria-hidden="true">🏛</span> JHB: Training Room &nbsp;·&nbsp; CPT: Table Mountain &amp; Newlands Meeting Rooms</span>
  </div>
  <a class="ccs-hero-cta" href="https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=hdvPlCM9SUigZlza2WXM2AYv7RPSF49BsSdfvCGj1WdUQTJHV1Q1SUtVSjlDMVBZQTdOMTdUVlNWMS4u">RSVP Now →</a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about" class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">About</div>
  <p class="ccs-about-text">
    Code Connect Summit brings together the Synthesis tech team for a full day of knowledge sharing, debate, and hands-on learning.
    Featuring presentations, a keynote, a panel on the future of software engineering in the age of AI, and a hands-on workshop.
    Hosted simultaneously in Johannesburg and Cape Town.
  </p>
</section>

```

```{=html}
<!-- HOSTS -->
<section id="hosts" class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">Hosts</div>
  <div class="ccs-speakers-grid" id="hostsGrid">

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Host - Kieron.png" alt="Kieron"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Kieron</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Host - Kieron.png" alt="Kieron"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Kieron</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Kieron is a senior technology leader and a member of the Technology Office at Synthesis. As Lead Applied Engineer, he has played a key role in rolling out AI methodologies and tooling across the business, earning him the affectionate title of &#8220;that agent guy.&#8221; When he is not revolutionising software development practices, Kieron is an avid board game &#8220;player&#8221; &#8212; which is to say, collector &#8212; and enjoys spending time with his family, reading, and listening to dumb podcasts about funny but largely inconsequential things (come talk to me about &#8216;Bigfeets&#8217;).</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Host - Archie.png" alt="Archie"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Archie</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Host - Archie.png" alt="Archie"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Archie</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Archie is the Lead Research Engineer and a software, data, and AI specialist who finds a strange amount of joy in tackling &#8220;impossible&#8221; problems. Armed with an MIT PhD and a patent tucked away, Archie&#8217;s real mission is building end-to-end AI solutions where data security and privacy are treated like VIP guests. It&#8217;s all about fusing innovation with systems that are as rock-solid as they are smart. Between architecting the future, you&#8217;ll find Archie refueling with iced tea, giving Kieron a hard time, or being politely bossed around by a very assertive puppy.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- SPEAKERS -->
<section id="speakers" class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">Speakers</div>
  <div class="ccs-speakers-grid" id="speakersGrid">

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Speaker - Tom.png" alt="Tom"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Tom</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Speaker - Tom.png" alt="Tom"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Tom</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Tom is a natural technologist who spends his time experimenting with and evaluating new ideas, architectures, and tools. He is responsible for technical strategy and identifying future emerging disruptors.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Speaker - Vincent.png" alt="Vincent"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Vincent</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Speaker - Vincent.png" alt="Vincent"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Vincent</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Vincent works in the Intelligent Data team. He stumbled into data science largely by accident after getting a degree in theoretical physics. In his free time he tries to keep his life in order, plays some classical guitar, runs, and messes around on harmonica. He also occasionally messes around with coding puzzles.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Speaker - Enoch.png" alt="Enoch"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Enoch</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Speaker - Enoch.png" alt="Enoch"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Enoch</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Enoch is a member of the Intelligent Data team where he serves as a Data Engineer and resident Gen-Z. Specializing in streaming data engineering and MLOps, he spends his time architecting low-latency systems. When he's not behind the drums, he's usually providing the team with existential shower thoughts that nobody asked for.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Speaker - Nick.png" alt="Nick"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Nicholas</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Speaker - Nick.png" alt="Nick"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Nicholas</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Nick's relationship with computers started before he could properly write, and his handwriting is testament to the fact. After early exposure to networking and hardware through his father's company, he grew up terminal-first and still prefers a shell to a GUI. An MSc in Chemistry researching low-cost solar cells, Nick brings a scientist's allergy to hand-wavy BS and a bias toward feedback loops, measurement, and evidence over vibes. He pivoted into software the hard way: Nand2Tetris, low-level systems, no dependencies, no shortcuts. Since 2024, he has been deep in LLMs, agentic workflows, and the slightly cursed mission of automating himself out of a job through self-healing software factories.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Speaker - Rodney.png" alt="Rodney"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Rodney</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Speaker - Rodney.png" alt="Rodney"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Rodney</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Rodney is a Technical Lead for Managed Operations and manages a DevOps team at Synthesis Software Technologies. He focuses on automation, Kubernetes, cloud platforms, and practical engineering delivery, helping teams operate more reliably and efficiently. With a strong interest in solving real-world technical problems, Rodney enjoys working with tools and practices that make systems easier to manage, scale, and support. His work sits at the intersection of DevOps, platform operations, automation, and continuous improvement. Outside of work, Rodney is interested in home automation, IoT, and renewable energy.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-speaker-card" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-expanded="false" onclick="expandSpeaker(this)" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();expandSpeaker(this)}">
      <div class="ccs-speaker-front">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-avatar"><img src="images/Speaker - Jason.png" alt="Jason"></div>
        <div class="ccs-speaker-name">Jason</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ccs-speaker-detail">
        <div class="ccs-speaker-photo"><img src="images/Speaker - Jason.png" alt="Jason"></div>
        <div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-name">Jason</div>
          <div class="ccs-speaker-bio-text">Jason is a software professional at Synthesis Software Technologies, where he has worked in the software industry for around three and a half years. Alongside his work in technology, Jason has developed a strong passion for endurance sports, having completed five half Ironman events and one marathon. As part of his training, Jason regularly uses a smart trainer at home and has spent plenty of time working with the software that connects to it — sparking his curiosity about how that technology is built and creating the perfect opportunity to bring together his passion for endurance sport and his profession in software engineering. Outside of work and training, Jason is also passionate about coffee, another hobby he hopes to explore through the lens of technology in a future talk.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<script>
function expandSpeaker(card) {
  var grid = card.closest('.ccs-speakers-grid');
  var cards = grid.querySelectorAll('.ccs-speaker-card');
  var isOpen = card.classList.contains('open');
  cards.forEach(function(c) {
    c.classList.remove('open');
    c.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  });
  if (!isOpen) {
    card.classList.add('open');
    card.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
  }
}
</script>
```

```{=html}
<!-- SCHEDULE -->
<section id="schedule" class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">Schedule</div>
  <table class="ccs-schedule-table" aria-label="Conference schedule">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th scope="col">Time</th>
        <th scope="col">Session</th>
        <th scope="col">Presenter(s)</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">09:00–09:10</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Welcome</span></td>
        <td>Kieron &amp; Archie</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">09:10–09:40</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Keynote</span></td>
        <td>Tom</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">09:45–10:15</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Functional Programming == Object Oriented Programming</span></td>
        <td>Vincent</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-tba">
        <td class="ccs-time">10:20–10:50</td>
        <td>To Be Announced</td>
        <td>TBA</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-break">
        <td class="ccs-time">10:50–11:10</td>
        <td colspan="2"><span aria-hidden="true">☕</span> Break</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-tba">
        <td class="ccs-time">11:10–11:55</td>
        <td>To Be Announced</td>
        <td>TBA</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">12:00–12:30</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Running Kubernetes at Home the Easy Way, Because Overcomplicating Things Is a Lifestyle Choice</span></td>
        <td>Rodney</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-break">
        <td class="ccs-time">12:30–13:30</td>
        <td colspan="2"><span aria-hidden="true">🍽</span> Lunch Break</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">13:30–13:50</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Algorave 101 — Making Music by Editing Code Live</span></td>
        <td>Enoch</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-tba">
        <td class="ccs-time">13:50–14:20</td>
        <td>To Be Announced</td>
        <td>TBA</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">14:20–14:50</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Self-Healing Codebases</span></td>
        <td>Nicholas</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-special">
        <td class="ccs-time">14:50–15:50</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Workshop: Smart Trainer — Realtime AI Fitness Trainer</span></td>
        <td>Jason</td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="ccs-row-break">
        <td class="ccs-time">15:50–16:10</td>
        <td colspan="2"><span aria-hidden="true">☕</span> Break</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td class="ccs-time">16:10–16:30</td>
        <td><span class="ccs-talk-title">Final Thank You &amp; Prizes</span></td>
        <td>Kieron &amp; Archie</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- RSVP -->
<section id="rsvp" class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">RSVP</div>
  <div class="ccs-rsvp-box">
    <p>Secure your spot for Code Connect Summit 2026.<br>June 5th · Synthesis Office JHB &amp; CPT · 09:00–16:30</p>
    <a class="ccs-rsvp-btn" href="https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=hdvPlCM9SUigZlza2WXM2AYv7RPSF49BsSdfvCGj1WdUQTJHV1Q1SUtVSjlDMVBZQTdOMTdUVlNWMS4u">Register Now →</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">Contact</div>
  <div class="ccs-contact-text">
    Questions? Reach out to the hosts:<br>
    <a href="mailto:kieron@synthesis.co.za">kieron@synthesis.co.za</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    <a href="mailto:archana@synthesis.co.za">archana@synthesis.co.za</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="ccs-footer">
  <div class="ccs-footer-logo"><span aria-hidden="true">⬡</span> synthesis</div>
  Code Connect Summit 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Synthesis Software Technologies
</footer>
```
